steps: We review your request and confirm the best call format.

metadata.title: Privacy Policy
metadata.description: Privacy policy for Saf9a site visitors, contact requests, and booking requests.

hero.title: Minimal data. Clear handling.
hero.description: We respect your privacy and keep data collection to a minimum.

paragraphs: We only collect information you choose to share through the contact form, booking request form, or by emailing us directly. We use this information to respond to your request and to provide project estimates or proposals.
We do not sell or rent your data. We may store communication records for internal reference and compliance.
privacy.contactPrefix: If you have questions about your data or want it removed, contact us at
